title: Xtra Energizing Italian Apples Tuscan Stracciatella
description: A refreshing, pillowy Italian dessert featuring Braeburn apples, sashimi-cut and raw-friendly, in a creamy stracciatella form, blending the flavors of Tuscany with pure energy.

ingredients.name: Coconut oil
ingredients.notes: melted and used as a topping

instructions: Combine sliced Braeburn apples and cashew cream in a blender and process until smooth.
Transfer the mixture to a bowl and whisk in Tuscan honey, melted coconut oil, salt, and lemon zest.
Sprinkle gelatin over a small amount of cold water and let it bloom for 5 minutes, then whisk it into the apple mixture.
Pour the mixture into a strainer set over a bowl and press out as much liquid as possible.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and sprinkle with microgreens and a pinch of salt.
Drizzle Balsamic vinegar and coconut sugar over the top and garnish with fresh nutmeg.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the mixture to set.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional microgreens if desired.
Garnish with a sprinkle of dried Italian herbs and a drizzle of almond extract if desired.
